name_en: 【New】Model: 837467. This Gucci Softbit shoulder bag artfully incorporates the brand's classic equestrian style accessory in a large half-bit buckle design.
name_cn:
【New】Model: 837467. This Gucci Softbit shoulder bag artfully incorporates the brand's classic equestrian style accessory in a large half-bit buckle design.
Brown grainy cowhide
Light gold-tone hardware
Dark brown microfiber lining
Half-bit buckle
Fits iPhone Pro Max/Plus, AirPods, long wallet and lipstick
Handle height: 15cm
Magnetic snap closure
Size: 27.5cm (W) x 21cm (H) x 16cm (D)
Weight: approx. 0.6kg
Color: Black full leather/Original leather.
Made in Italy
